title: B.S. Computer Science Outcomes at WGU
notes: Includes outcome-to-competency mapping table and charts for program assessment results (July 2018 through June 2022). ABET CAC-style outcome numbering suggests ABET accreditation alignment.

title: B.S. Computer Science Program Guide
notes: PDF program guide is available for download on this page. Also references an accelerated track variant.

title: B.S. Cybersecurity and Information Assurance Program Guide
notes: PDF program guide is available for download on this page.

title: B.S. Cybersecurity and Information Assurance Outcomes at WGU
notes: Seven primary program outcomes listed including security evaluation and network/cloud/mobile threat mitigation. Includes outcome mapping table and two data charts.

title: B.S. Software Engineering (Java Track) Program Guide
notes: PDF guide filename is BSSWE_Java.pdf. This is a track-specific program guide page, not the main BSSWE program guide.

title: B.S. Data Analytics Program Guide
notes: PDF program guide is available for download on this page.

title: Data Science Specialization | Data Analytics – M.S.
notes: Three specializations exist under M.S. Data Analytics: Data Science, Data Engineering, and Decision Process Engineering. Graduates earn three stackable certificates: Data Operations, Data Analytics Professional, and Data Science Professional Specialization. 35% job growth projected through 2032.

title: M.S. Data Analytics – Decision Process Engineering Program Guide
notes: PDF program guide is available for download on this page. This is a specialization-specific guide page, not the main MSDA program guide.
program_candidates: M.S. Data Analytics (Decision Process Engineering Specialization)

title: AI Engineering Specialization | M.S. Software Engineering
notes: The M.S. Software Engineering program features three specializations; AI Engineering is one. Cost is $4,385 per six-month term. Admission requires a bachelor's degree plus programming experience.

title: B.S. Business Management Program Guide
notes: PDF program guide is available for download on this page. Related business programs listed include Healthcare Administration, Human Resources Management, and Marketing.

title: ACBSP Accreditation for WGU School of Business
notes: Downloadable PDF program results reports available on this page covering FY2022-2024. Covers multiple programs across the School of Business. The URL path 'successful-student-learning-outcomes' is misleading; this is primarily an ACBSP accreditation page.

title: M.S. Nursing – Family Nurse Practitioner (BSN to MSN) Program Guide
notes: PDF program guide is available for download on this page. Program is available in select states only.

title: CAHIIM Accreditation – B.S. Health Information Management
notes: 61% of graduates complete the degree in 36 months or less. CAHIIM requires annual program assessment reports. Graduates are eligible for RHIA and RHIT exams — important for certification_context as well.

title: M.A. Science Education (Secondary Biological Sciences) Program Guide
notes: PDF program guide is available for download on this page. Competency-based online graduate program for aspiring secondary biology teachers.

title: Teachers Learning Results (CAEP)
notes: Downloadable PDF (CAEP-accreditation-2024.pdf) available on page. Covers all initial and advanced licensure programs in the Teachers College — elementary, secondary science/math/English, special education, educational leadership. Praxis pass rates: 80.18% initial, 90.33% advanced, 85.25% all programs. Includes Teacher of the Year recipient highlights.
